academic_requirement: Renewal subject to minimum CGPA and SGPA 6.0; selection as per institute rules
benefit_description: ₹4,000 per month and tuition-fee exemption; approximately 25% of eligible UG engineering/technology students, subject to rules. Potentially applicable, not guaranteed.
required_documents: Family-income certificate; category documents where applicable; academic records
renewal_conditions: Minimum CGPA and SGPA 6.0 and institute conditions

applicable_programme: Four-year B.Tech and five-year dual-degree programmes
academic_requirement: Top 7% of each programme/semester under institute rules
benefit_description: ₹2,500 per semester for the top 7% of each eligible programme through the specified programme semester.
required_documents: Normally based on institute academic records
renewal_conditions: Must remain in the eligible top-performing group

category_requirement: Means-based students not covered within the MCM allocation
benefit_description: Tuition-fee waiver for up to about 10% of students on means basis when eligible demand exceeds MCM coverage; official verification required.
Tuition fee is nil under the published 2026-27 fee schedule; other institute and hostel-related charges remain payable.
duration: Programme duration subject to continuing eligibility
renewal_conditions: Continuing valid status and institute rules

scholarship_name: Free Messing and Pocket Allowance for eligible SC/ST students
benefit_description: Free messing plus ₹1,000 per month pocket allowance for eligible SC/ST students for the notified period; official verification required before matching.
required_documents: Category certificate; income certificate; institute application
